commands.repair_reason: Manual review only: there is no narrow code repair target, but contributor-visible real behavior proof and exact-head check handling are still merge blockers.; Cleared: The diff only changes Mattermost setup config application plus a test and changelog; it adds no dependency, CI, network, permission, or new secret storage surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Mattermost wizard-specific token and base URL apply handlers, factors shared setup patching into setup-core, adds a regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main's wizard applies the Mattermost bot-token credential before the httpUrl text input, and that fallback path validates both values together, so the failure path is clear from source and corroborated by the linked issue comments.
commands.review_followup: Manual review only: there is no narrow code repair target, but contributor-visible real behavior proof and exact-head check handling are still merge blockers.
